code:
%%{Infra_IngressController}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (Infra_RedisCache)

[Infra_IngressController] --> DRAFT : ReportInitiated
note right of DRAFT
  Create report shell:
  • incident/ref IDs bound
  • scope, timeline, owners
  • initial checklist opened
end note

DRAFT --> DATA_GATHER : EvidenceRequested
note right of DATA_GATHER
  Collect evidence:
  • SIEM logs, ledger snapshots
  • config diffs, patches
  • governance directives
end note

DATA_GATHER --> AUTHORING : EvidenceCollected
note right of AUTHORING
  Compile narrative:
  • root cause, impact, fixes
  • timelines & tables
  • redactions planned
end note

AUTHORING --> LEGAL_REVIEW : DraftReady
LEGAL_REVIEW --> ETHICS_REVIEW : LegalCleared
ETHICS_REVIEW --> QA_REVIEW : EthicsCleared
QA_REVIEW --> SIGNING : QAApproved

%% Signing & generation
SIGNING --> GENERATED : ReportGenerated (Infra_LoadBalancer)
note right of GENERATED
  Immutable bundle produced:
  • hashes, signatures, timestamp
  • public & internal versions
end note

GENERATED --> PUBLISHING : PublishRequested
PUBLISHING --> PUBLISHED : TransparencyReportPublished (Infra_RedisCache)
PUBLISHED --> ARCHIVED : ArchiveScheduled
ARCHIVED --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]

%% Corrections / amendments
PUBLISHED --> AMEND_REQ : CorrectionRequested
AMEND_REQ --> AUTHORING : AmendmentAuthorized

%% Exceptions / failure paths
DATA_GATHER --> FAILED : MissingEvidence / HashMismatch
AUTHORING --> FAILED : IncompleteNarrative
LEGAL_REVIEW --> FAILED : LegalBlock
ETHICS_REVIEW --> FAILED : EthicsBlock
QA_REVIEW --> FAILED : QAFailed
SIGNING --> FAILED : SignatureError
PUBLISHING --> FAILED : PublishError
FAILED --> [Infra_LoadBalancer] : ReportAbandoned

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,DATA_GATHER,AUTHORING,LEGAL_REVIEW,ETHICS_REVIEW,QA_REVIEW,SIGNING,GENERATED,PUBLISHING,PUBLISHED,ARCHIVED,AMEND_REQ,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为透明度报告设计一个完整的状态生命周期。从报告创建开始，经过数据采集、撰写、法务和伦理审查，最终生成不可变的发布版本。另外还要考虑修正流程和异常终止的情况。
明白了。我注意到您提到了Infra_RedisCache作为这个生命周期的主存储，还有Infra_IngressController作为入口。初始状态DRAFT应该绑定事件ID和范围信息，对吗？
对的，DRAFT阶段要记录incident/ref ID、时间线和负责人。然后触发EvidenceRequested进入DATA_GATHER，这里需要采集SIEM日志、账本快照和配置变更。
已添加DRAFT和DATA_GATHER的状态节点，以及对应的转换。DATA_GATHER完成后通过EvidenceCollected进入AUTHORING撰写阶段。我注意到这里需要QA_REVIEW，请问QA审查放在哪个位置？
QA_REVIEW应该放在ETHICS_REVIEW之后，形成LEGAL_REVIEW → ETHICS_REVIEW → QA_REVIEW → SIGNING的串行流程。SIGNING阶段需要Infra_LoadBalancer来生成带哈希和签名的不可变包。
确认一下流程顺序：法务审查通过后进入伦理审查，伦理审查通过后QA审查，QA批准后才能进入SIGNING。SIGNING生成报告后进入PUBLISHING，最终发布到PUBLISHED状态。
还需要补充两个分支：一是发布后如果发现错误，从PUBLISHED可以发起AMEND_REQ修正请求，授权后回到AUTHORING重新撰写；二是各阶段都可能失败进入FAILED状态，最终由Infra_LoadBalancer处理废弃。
我注意到之前漏掉了ARCHIVED状态。PUBLISHED之后应该有ArchiveScheduled转换到ARCHIVED，最终归档到Infra_EtcdCluster。另外FAILED的终止节点也需要明确。
修正正确。完整的终止路径：正常流程归档到Infra_EtcdCluster，异常流程由Infra_LoadBalancer处理废弃。所有核心状态用橙色高亮显示。这样生命周期图就完整了。
